description: A law firm needs to archive software license agreements into the Oracle Database. Create a DIRECTORY object named 'LICENSE_DIR' pointing to the OS path '/tmp/licenses' and grant READ permission to the 'hr' user (system/OraclePassword123). In the 'hr' schema (hr/hr123), archive the 5 text files from '/tmp/licenses' into a new table named 'LICENSE_ARCHIVE' with columns for ID (NUMBER, Primary Key), FILENAME (VARCHAR2(255)), FILE_CONTENT (BLOB), FILE_HASH (VARCHAR2(64)), and INGEST_DATE (DATE, default SYSDATE). The FILE_HASH column must contain the SHA-256 hash of the binary data. Identify any duplicate files based on their hashes and save a report listing the filenames and the shared hash to /home/ga/Desktop/duplicate_report.txt.
